overall.description: Gameplay footage from a racing game (Forza Horizon 5) showing first-person driving on a rural mountain road. The vehicle travels from open grasslands into dense forested areas, passing occasional rural buildings and road signs, with speed decreasing from 80+ km/h to 30 km/h as the road becomes more winding and approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural highway through grassland with mountain backdrop

events.description: passing red rural building on the left side of the road
yellow diamond road sign appears on the right shoulder

agents.ego_description: accelerating to 88 km/h on a straight rural highway, maintaining center lane position

entered.detail: distant mountain ridge forming the horizon backdrop
two-lane paved road with white center line and cracked surface texture
open green pasture land extending to the mountain base
small red painted structure with dark roof near the roadside
line of wooden posts marking the field boundary

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels at high speed through open countryside with expansive grass fields and distant mountains. A red building passes by on the left as the road stretches ahead, transitioning from sparse to moderate tree coverage along the roadside.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested rural highway with canopy forming overhead

events.description: road enters denser tree coverage creating a partial canopy effect
dark sedan overtakes the ego vehicle on the left side

agents.ego_description: maintaining 60-70 km/h through winding sections, navigating gentle curves

notable_agents.action: dark sedan overtaking on the left at moderate speed

entered.detail: tall green trees forming a wall along the left roadside
small pink painted house with white trim visible through trees

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from open fields to a forested corridor with trees lining both sides of the road. A dark sedan overtakes on the left, and a pink rural building appears on the right as the vehicle maintains speed through the winding forest road.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest corridor with stone walls and rural structures

events.description: stone wall appears along the right roadside boundary
yellow rural house with thatched roof appears on the right

agents.ego_description: navigating continuous curves at steady 55-58 km/h through the forested mountain pass

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the road edge
small yellow building with thatched roof and wooden fence

segments.scene_description: The road winds through dense forest with thick tree canopy on both sides. A stone wall runs along the right edge, and a yellow rural house appears briefly. The vehicle maintains steady speed through the continuous curves of the mountain road.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested approach to T-intersection with stop control

events.description: heavy braking initiated, speed drops rapidly from 58 km/h to 35 km/h
approaching stop sign at upcoming intersection

agents.ego_description: braking heavily to stop at the intersection, speed decreasing from 58 to 29 km/h

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign with white border on the right shoulder
T-intersection with cross traffic road visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a T-intersection in the dense forest, initiating heavy braking. A red stop sign becomes visible on the right as the speed drops significantly from 58 km/h to 29 km/h, preparing to stop at the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transforms from a high-speed journey through open countryside into a slow approach toward a forested intersection. It begins with the vehicle speeding past expansive grass fields and a red building under the gaze of distant mountains, as the roadside vegetation gradually thickens. As the open landscape shifts into a forested corridor, a dark sedan overtakes on the left and a pink rural building appears on the right. The scene then narrows further into a dense forest with a thick canopy and a stone wall lining the curves of the mountain road, passing a yellow rural house. Finally, the camera approaches a T-intersection where the vehicle initiates heavy braking, slowing significantly as a red stop sign becomes visible on the right.
